title: hieracium leithneri
intro: Hieracium leithneri, also known as Alpine Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium leithneri include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
